name: Hf Markets
description: HF Markets (HFM) is a multi-regulated broker (FCA, CySEC, FSCA, DFSA) with 2.5M+ accounts across 180+ countries. 7 specific awards 2021-2024 including Best Forex Broker Global Finance (2024). Arsenal FC official partner (2023). CPA $15-$500, 40% rev share.
fullReview:
# HF Markets (HotForex/HFM) — Deep Dive Analysis

**Last Updated:** April 2026
**Risk Tier:** Low–Medium (Multi-Jurisdiction Regulated)

> ⚠️ **Disclaimer:** CFDs are complex instruments. Between 74–89% of retail investor accounts lose money when trading CFDs with HF Markets. Consider whether you understand how CFDs work and whether you can afford the high risk of losing your money. This analysis is for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial advice.

---

## Table of Contents

1. [Regulation & Licensing](#1-regulation--licensing)
2. [Company Background](#2-company-background)
3. [Trading Conditions](#3-trading-conditions)
4. [Platforms & Technology](#4-platforms--technology)
5. [Instruments](#5-instruments)
6. [Pros & Cons](#6-pros--cons)
7. [Risk Assessment](#7-risk-assessment)
8. [Verdict](#8-verdict)

---

## 1. Regulation & Licensing

### Overview

HF Markets (formerly HotForex, rebranded to HFM) operates under **6+ regulatory licenses** across multiple jurisdictions, including one Tier-1 regulator (FCA UK) and several Tier-2/Tier-3 regulators. The broker has a significant presence in emerging markets, particularly Africa, Asia, and the Middle East.

### License Portfolio

#### License #1: FCA — United Kingdom

| Field | Details |
|-------|---------|
| **Regulator** | Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) |
| **License Number** | 801227 |
| **Verification Link** | [FCA Register](https://register.fca.org.uk/) |
| **Entity Name** | HF Markets (UK) Ltd |
| **Status** | 🟢 Active |
| **Jurisdiction** | United Kingdom |
| **Date Obtained** | 2018 |

**What This Means For You:**
- **Leverage Limits:** 30:1 for major forex (ESMA compliant)
- **Segregation of Funds:** Yes — Tier 1 UK banks
- **Negative Balance Protection:** Yes
- **Compensation Scheme:** FSCS — up to £85,000 per client

#### License #2: CySEC — Cyprus

|-------|---------|

| **License Number** | 183/12 |

| **Entity Name** | HF Markets (Europe) Ltd |
| **Status** | 🟢 Active |
| **Jurisdiction** | EU/EEA (passported) |
| **Date Obtained** | 2012 |

**What This Means For You:**
- **Leverage Limits:** 30:1 for major forex (MiFID II)
- **Segregation of Funds:** Yes
- **Negative Balance Protection:** Yes
- **Compensation Scheme:** ICF — up to €20,000 per client

### Regulatory History
- Renamed from HotForex to HFM in 2022

---

## 2. Company Background

| Field | Details |
|-------|---------|
| **Full Name** | HF Markets Group |
| **Founded** | 2010 |
| **Headquarters** | Limassol, Cyprus (EU operations); Kingstown, St. Vincent (international) |
| **Parent Company** | HF Markets Group |
| **CEO** | George Koumantaris |
| **Employees** | 300+ |
| **Global Entities** | 6+ |
| **Website** | https://www.hfm.com |
| **Years in Operation** | 16+ years |

### Company History
- **2010:** Founded as HotForex in St. Vincent and the Grenadines
- **2012:** Obtained CySEC license (183/12), entering European markets
- **2018:** Received FCA authorization (801227), expanding to UK clients
- **2019:** Launched HF App — proprietary mobile application
- **2020:** Expanded to South Africa (FSCA), Dubai (DFSA), and Kenya (CMA)
- **2022:** Major rebrand from HotForex to HFM (HF Markets)
- **2023–2026:** Continued global expansion, focused on emerging markets

### Brand Rebrand (HotForex → HFM)
In 2022, HotForex completed a full rebrand to "HFM" (HF Markets). The rebrand included a new logo, website redesign, and updated trading platforms while maintaining the same regulatory entities and account structures.

---

### Unique Trading Features
- **HFM Copy Trading:** Built-in social/copy trading platform with strategy providers
- **PAMM Accounts:** Percentage Allocation Management Module for investors
- **HF App:** Proprietary mobile app for account management
- **Cent Accounts:** Trade with cents instead of dollars — ideal for testing strategies
- **Leverage up to 1:2000:** Available on offshore entity (FSA Seychelles)

## 4. Platforms & Technology

### Available Platforms

| Platform | Desktop | Web | Mobile | Best For |
|----------|---------|-----|--------|----------|
| **MetaTrader 4** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | Algo trading, EAs, most popular |
| **MetaTrader 5** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | Advanced charting |
| **HF App** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | Mobile account management |
| **cTrader** | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | Not available |

### Platform Details

**MetaTrader 4 (MT4)**
- Full EA support, 9 timeframes, 30 indicators
- MQL4 programming language
- Back-testing and optimization
- One-click trading

**MetaTrader 5 (MT5)**
- 21 timeframes, 38 indicators
- Depth of Market (DOM)
- Economic calendar integration
- MQL5 programming language
- Enhanced multi-asset support

**HF App (Proprietary)**
- Mobile-first account management
- Quick deposit/withdrawal
- Copy trading integration
- Push notifications
- Available on iOS and Android

### Additional Tools
- **HFM Copy Trading:** Dedicated social trading platform
- **Autochartist:** Automated chart pattern recognition
- **VPS Hosting:** Available for automated traders
- **Trading Calculator:** Margin, pip value, and profit calculators
- **Economic Calendar:** Real-time economic events

---

## 6. Pros & Cons

### ✅ Pros (7 Key Advantages)

1. **Extensive Multi-Jurisdiction Regulation (6+ Regulators)** — FCA (UK), CySEC (EU), FSCA (South Africa), DFSA (Dubai), CMA (Kenya), FSA (Seychelles) — providing regulatory coverage across developed and emerging markets

2. **Leverage up to 1:2000** — One of the highest leverage offerings in the industry through the Seychelles entity, appealing to traders in regions where high leverage is desired

3. **$0 Minimum Deposit (Most Accounts)** — Accessible entry point for traders of all levels across Premium, Zero, and Cent accounts

4. **Built-in Copy Trading Platform** — HFM Copy Trading is a dedicated social trading platform with strategy leaderboards, performance metrics, and automated copying — no third-party integration needed

5. **Cent Accounts Available** — Unique feature allowing traders to practice with micro-amounts (cents instead of dollars), excellent for strategy testing and beginners

6. **1,100+ Instruments** — Comprehensive offering including 950+ share CFDs, 40+ crypto pairs, and diverse asset classes

7. **Strong Emerging Market Presence** — Regulated in South Africa, Kenya, and Dubai, making it one of the few brokers with proper local regulation in Africa and the Middle East

### ❌ Cons (5 Key Drawbacks)

1. **Inactivity Fee ($5/month)** — After 6 months of no trading activity, HF Markets charges $5/month, which can erode small account balances

2. **Higher Standard Spreads** — Premium account spreads (from 1.2 pips EUR/USD) are wider than competitors like Eightcap (1.0 pip) or IC Markets (0.8 pips)

3. **No cTrader Platform** — Missing cTrader limits appeal to traders who prefer its advanced DOM and interface over MT4/MT5

4. **Limited Tier-1 Regulation** — Only one Tier-1 regulator (FCA) and one Tier-1.5 (CySEC), compared to brokers with multiple Tier-1 licenses like Eightcap or Pepperstone

5. **Brand Confusion from Rebrand** — The HotForex → HFM rebrand in 2022 caused some market confusion; some review sites still list the broker under the old name

6. **Offshore Entity Concerns** — The FSA Seychelles entity offering 1:2000 leverage raises risk management concerns for retail traders

---

## 7. Risk Assessment

### Overall Risk Rating: **LOW–MEDIUM** ⚠️

| Risk Factor | Rating | Details |
|-------------|--------|---------|
| **Regulatory Risk** | 🟢 Low–Medium | FCA + CySEC provide solid Tier 1 coverage |
| **Fund Safety** | 🟢 Low | Segregated funds across all entities |
| **Company Stability** | 🟢 Low | 16+ year track record, 300+ employees |
| **Offshore Risk** | 🟡 Medium | 1:2000 leverage via Seychelles entity |
| **Platform Risk** | 🟢 Low | Industry-standard MT4/MT5 |
| **Counterparty Risk** | 🟢 Low | Market execution model |

### Risk Summary

HF Markets provides **adequate regulatory protection for UK and EU clients** through FCA and CySEC licenses with FSCS and ICF compensation. The broker's 16+ year history and multi-jurisdictional presence add credibility.

**Key Risk Mitigants:**
- FSCS protection up to £85,000 (UK clients)
- ICF protection up to €20,000 (EU clients)
- Negative balance protection on most entities
- Segregated client funds across all entities
- 16+ years of continuous operation

**Risk Factors to Monitor:**
- High-leverage offshore entity (1:2000) could expose traders to excessive risk
- Inactivity fee may affect dormant accounts
- Past industry reputation concerns (pre-rebrand era)

---

## 8. Verdict

### Who Is HF Markets Best For?

| Trader Type | Suitability | Score |
|-------------|-------------|-------|
| **Emerging Market Traders (Africa/ME)** | ✅ Excellent | 9/10 |
| **Copy Traders** | ✅ Excellent | 9/10 |
| **Beginners (Cent Accounts)** | ✅ Excellent | 9/10 |
| **High-Leverage Traders** | ✅ Excellent | 9/10 |
| **Day Traders** | ✅ Good | 7/10 |
| **Scalpers** | ⚠️ Average | 6/10 |
| **Cost-Sensitive Traders** | ⚠️ Average | 6/10 |

### Final Rating

| Category | Score |
|----------|-------|
| Regulation & Trust | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 7.5/10 |
| Trading Costs | ⭐⭐⭐ 6.5/10 |
| Platforms & Tools | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 7.5/10 |
| Instruments | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 8/10 |
| Research & Education | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 7/10 |
| Customer Support | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 7.5/10 |
| **Overall** | **⭐⭐⭐⭐ 7.3/10** |

### Bottom Line

HF Markets (HFM) is a **well-established multi-jurisdictional broker** that excels in emerging markets and offers unique features like cent accounts and built-in copy trading. Its FCA and CySEC regulation provides solid protection for UK/EU traders, while its presence in South Africa, Kenya, and Dubai makes it one of the few properly regulated brokers in Africa and the Middle East.

The main drawbacks are slightly wider standard spreads and an inactivity fee. Traders who prioritize low costs should consider the Zero account or look at competitors like Fusion Markets or Eightcap.

**Recommended for:** Emerging market traders, copy traders, beginners using cent accounts, high-leverage traders (offshore), and those seeking diverse instruments.

**Not recommended for:** Cost-sensitive scalpers, traders who need cTrader, or those seeking extensive research tools.

---

> **Data Sources:** HFM official website, FCA/CySEC/FSCA/DFSA/CMA public registers, industry comparison data. Spread and commission figures based on published rates as of early 2026.
